description: Islamic Azad University is the largest university system in Iran, with branches across the country. It was founded in 1982 by [Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani) and operates as a private, non-profit institution. It has played a significant role in expanding higher education access in Iran.
editorial_notes: Often referred to simply as Azad University. Rafsanjani founded it and it was closely associated with him.
